description: Single source of truth for the CBOM OpenSearch document contract. Every cbom_* / cf_* field is declared once here with its OpenSearch type. The OpenSearch index mapping (opensearch_stack role) is generated from this file by gen_opensearch_mapping.py, and cbom_ingest.py reads the producer registry below to dispatch by the explicit `schema` field instead of startswith() sniffing. Adding a producer or a field is a one-file edit here; consumers pick it up.

@timestamp.doc: Event time; pinned by time-filtered dashboards. Mirrors cbom_scan_time.

cbom_envelope_version.doc: Version of this envelope contract the document was produced under.

cbom_schema.doc: Producer schema id (e.g. cyclonedx, cloudflare_pqc/v1, adcs_pqc_audit/v1) — drives ingest dispatch.

cbom_scan_time.doc: Scan timestamp; component of the deterministic _id.

cbom_vm.doc: Source VM/host name derived from location.

cbom_location.doc: Filesystem/endpoint location; component of the deterministic _id.

cbom_bom_ref.doc: CycloneDX bom-ref or synthetic ref; component of the deterministic _id.

cbom_pqc_only.doc: True when the component came from a pure-PQC endpoint ([PQC-ONLY] prefix).

cbom_pqc_status.doc: quantum-safe | quantum-vulnerable | weak-classical | unknown | pqc-hybrid | classical | failed.

adcs_layer.doc: AD CS PQC audit layer id (cng | certenroll | adcs | schannel).

adcs_layer_name.doc: AD CS PQC audit layer human name.

adcs_build.doc: Windows build the audit ran on (e.g. 26100.7171).

cyclonedx.doc: CycloneDX 1.6 CBOM from cbomkit-theia / nmap / ejbca-api / pqc-* probes. Default when no recognized `schema` key is present.

adcs_pqc_audit/v1.doc: AD CS layered PQC gap audit (Invoke-PqcAudit.ps1 -> JSON sidecar).
